original_text: Vendesi, vicino alla spiaggia principale e a 200 metri dal centro paese e 500 metri dal porto, comodo e arioso appartamento posto al piano terra e dotato di esterno privado su due lati. L’immobile e’ composto da sala con zona cucina, camera matrimoniale, camera singola, bagno, ingresso, veranda ed esterno privato. Viene venduto completo di arredamento.
rendered_description_en: For sale, near the main beach and 200 meters from the town center and 500 meters from the port, comfortable and airy apartment on the ground floor and equipped with a private exterior on two sides. The property consists of a living room with kitchen area, double bedroom, single bedroom, bathroom, entrance, veranda and private outdoor area. It is sold complete with furniture.
claude_text:
Ground-floor apartment in Vila Do Maio, Maio, located approximately 200 metres from the town centre, 500 metres from the port, and within close walking distance of the main beach. The unit benefits from private outdoor space on two sides.

The layout comprises a living area with kitchen zone, one double bedroom, one single bedroom, one bathroom, an entrance hall, and a covered veranda. The apartment is sold fully furnished.
gpt_text:
This ground-floor apartment is located in Vila Do Maio on the island of Maio, Cape Verde. Situated near the main beach and just 200 meters from the town center, it is also 500 meters from the port. The property features a private outdoor space on two sides.

The apartment includes a living room with a kitchen area, one double bedroom, one single bedroom, a bathroom, an entrance hall, and a veranda. It is sold fully furnished, providing convenience for immediate occupancy.

original_text:
Land, 125.7m2 in São Pedro – São Vicente, close to the sea and the main road, perfect for investment.



Architecture project already approved by the City Council.
claude_text:
A 125.7 m² land plot in São Pedro, São Vicente, situated close to the sea and the main road. An architecture project for the site has already received City Council approval.

The approved project is designed for two bedrooms and two bathrooms across 125.7 m², with sea views included in the plans.
gpt_text:
This property, located in São Pedro on the island of São Vicente, Cape Verde, spans 125.7 square meters and is situated near the sea and the main road. It features two bedrooms and two bathrooms, providing ample space for residential use.

The property comes with an approved architecture project from the City Council, offering a streamlined path for development. The location offers sea views, enhancing its appeal for various uses. The source notes that it is positioned as an investment opportunity.
